creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to geoffroy desvernay from comment #1)

Hi,

sympa fails consistently in my 13.3, 14.0 and 14.1 nested poudriere jails, running in 14.1 jail on 14.1 host. ~1700 other packages build successfully in all three.

I have re-activated my old setup where poudriere jails run directly on 14.1 host, I have started builds, will know more tommorrow and let you know.
